metadata.notes: Overnight extraction run. Sequential processing from file page 194. Page 194 seeded from golden_pages.AB_01_page_194 in gorila_sign_index.json. Page 195 bottom catalog seeded from golden_pages.AB_01_page_195_bottom. Git commits/pushes deferred: sandbox cannot remove .git/index.lock (virtiofs/host lock). Matt must 'rm -f .git/index.lock' on Mac then 'git add linear_a/data/gorila_sign_index_rows.json && git commit && git push'. | NON-SEQUENTIAL JUMP: pages 334-335 (A 301) extracted out of order to guarantee CRITICAL coverage. Pages 211-333 and 336+ remain to be filled.

metadata.validation_notes: Cross-checked against gorila_sign_variants.json. All signs in variants are covered in rows. Naming differences: variants uses 'A 400'-'A 418' for VAS ideograms while rows uses 'A 400VAS'-'A 418VAS'; variants uses 'A 28b', 'A 100/102', 'A 120b', 'A 131c' while rows uses 'AB 28b', 'AB 100/102', 'AB 120b', 'AB 131c'. Fraction signs A 701-A 713 (with 709 variants 709²/709³/709⁴/709⁶) are present in rows but absent from variants (fractions are not catalogued in the variants file). No coverage gaps. Page 377 'SIGNES DE PONCTUATION' (punctuation signs) added with sign_id prefix 'PUNCT'.
